name: ehs-course-qa-system
description: Local QA management and automation system for EHS course website

scripts.qa: npm run scan && npm run test && npm run coverage && npm run report
scripts.qa:all: node scripts/sync-from-site.js && node scripts/scan-site.js && node scripts/run-tests.js && node scripts/calculate-coverage.js && node scripts/generate-pdf-report.js
